trials.supervisor_analysis: Baseline established at score 65.0 (2.57ms vs 3.86ms reference, 1.50x speedup). Triton fused post-conv kernel is working correctly. Advancing to optimization stage.

nudges.text: Before writing optimized code, run the baseline benchmark first: `/opt/venv/bin/python3 /workspace/test_harness.py --level 2 --problem-id 93` to establish a baseline score. This will tell you the target to beat and ensure the environment works.
